query_title: The Immortal Life of Henrietta Lacks

recommendations.title: Rustin
recommendations.overview: Activist Bayard Rustin faces racism and homophobia as he helps change the course of Civil Rights history by orchestrating the 1963 March on Washington.

recommendations.title: You're Not You
recommendations.overview: When an accomplished pianist is diagnosed with the devastating and incurable disease ALS, she hires a directionless young woman who becomes her full-time caregiver. Complete opposites, the strangers form a life-changing bond inspiring each other to l

recommendations.title: Ma Rainey's Black Bottom
recommendations.overview: Tensions rise when the trailblazing Mother of the Blues and her band gather at a Chicago recording studio in 1927. Adapted from August Wilson's play.

recommendations.title: Nights in Rodanthe
recommendations.overview: Adrienne is trying to decide whether to stay in her unhappy marriage or not, and her life changes when Paul, a doctor who is travelling to reconcile with his estranged son, checks into an inn where she is staying.

recommendations.title: The Man Who Knew Infinity
recommendations.overview: Growing up poor in Madras, India, Srinivasa Ramanujan Iyengar earns admittance to Cambridge University during WWI, where he becomes a pioneer in mathematical theories with the guidance of his professor, G.H. Hardy.

recommendations.title: Glory Road
recommendations.overview: In 1966, Texas Western coach Don Haskins led the first all-black starting line-up for a college basketball team to the NCAA national championship.

recommendations.title: Swiped
recommendations.overview: Whitney Wolfe uses extraordinary grit and ingenuity to break into the male-dominated tech industry.

recommendations.title: Blackadder: Back & Forth
recommendations.genres: Comedy, History, Science Fiction, TV Movie
recommendations.overview: What was a cunning plan from Lord Edmund Blackadder V to fake a time machine on his gullibly incompetent friends, turns out to be the real thing and hurls him and his imbecile underling, Baldrick, through the course of human history.

recommendations.title: The Current War
recommendations.overview: Electricity titans Thomas Edison and George Westinghouse compete to create a sustainable system and market it to the American people.

recommendations.title: Godzilla vs. Biollante
